capture.note: Curated human adjudication of CoA advancement nodes present in the current client but absent from the Builder oracle capture. A client-only node NOT listed here (or listed as unresolved) blocks ownership_ready. Classifications follow the generalized Decision 22 ownership discrepancy classes: verified_client_current (accepted), representation_difference (normalize+accept), extraction_defect (blocks), unresolved (blocks). The client is the canonical current source; Builder absence is evidence of oracle staleness, not negative ownership evidence.
